metadata.title: Habla Juega
metadata.description: Spanish-first articulation practice for speech therapy. SLP-vetted word lists paired with delightful animated games.

landing.title: Habla Juega
landing.tagline: SLP-vetted word lists + animated games kids want to play again. Ready in 30 seconds.
landing.demoNote: Demo mode · no auth, no database. Sample data; great for previewing the flow.

games.title: Three games to keep them coming back
games.subtitle: Each one fits 6–12 trials. Same word list, different spectacle.

feed-the-shark.title: Feed the Shark
feed-the-shark.body: Each correct word feeds a friendly shark a fish. Fast pacing for short attention spans.

build-a-monster.title: Build a Monster
build-a-monster.body: Every turn grows a piece of a silly monster: eyes, horns, arms, spots, legs. Gentle tension that pays off at the end.

spin-the-wheel.title: Spin the Wheel
spin-the-wheel.body: A colorful roulette lands on the next word. Surprise + suspense — great for kids who tire of repetition.

features.title: What you'll love
features.subtitle: Built for therapists who assign homework, and for families who'll actually do it.

fast.title: Faster than a text
fast.body: Pick a sound, position, and game; share the link in under 30 seconds. Nothing to install.

family.title: Made for home
family.body: Kid and grown-up take turns: child says the word, parent confirms, the game advances.

curated.title: SLP-vetted lists
curated.body: Start with reviewed lists. Build your own with images + audio in Pro and share them anywhere.

safe.title: Kid-safe by default
safe.body: The play link has no tracking, asks for nothing, and contacts no third parties. COPPA-strict by design.

short.title: Short sessions
short.body: Each game runs 6–12 trials. Enough to practice, short enough to keep them coming back.

spanish.title: Spanish-first, dialect-aware
spanish.body: Lists and voices for Mexican, Iberian, and US Spanish. Switch between them when you need to.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps. Same flow every time.

choose.title: Pick a list
choose.body: Filter by phoneme (/r/, /s/, /l/…), position, and difficulty. Use a template or build your own in Pro.

send.title: Send the link
send.body: Generate a unique link for each student. Family receives it by email or message — no account required.

play.title: Family plays
play.body: Kid plays 6–12 turns with rewarding animations. You see how often the link was opened.

finalCta.title: 30 seconds for you. 5 minutes for the family.
finalCta.body: Try the demo or jump into the therapist view. No account needed to start.

footer.copy: © 2026 Habla Juega. Built with 🌶️ for Spanish-speaking SLPs.

errors.label: Error
errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: We had trouble loading this page. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

language.title: Language
language.description: Toggle the UI between English and Spanish. The Spanish vocabulary in lessons stays in Spanish.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Free covers the SLP-vetted lists and three games. Pro unlocks the custom list builder.

lists.title: Word lists
lists.description: Browse SLP-vetted lists and pick one to assign.

intro.title: Let's practice the {phoneme}!
intro.description: Take turns: your child says the word, you confirm and the game advances.

wheel.tapToSpin: Tap to spin and see your word.

demoMode.title: Demo mode
demoMode.description: Assignments need auth (Clerk) + a database (Neon). Set them up via docs/deployment.md and reload.

assignments.dialogDescription: Create a unique link so the family can play at home.
assignments.studentLabelHelp: Only you will see this. Never sent to the family.
assignments.linkHelp: Copy and send via email or message.
assignments.empty: You haven't created any links yet.

quickPlay.title: Send a link in 30 seconds
quickPlay.description: Pick a list by sound + position, choose a game, send it to the family. Faster than a text.

recentAssignments.title: Recent assignments
recentAssignments.description: What you've shared with families and how often it was opened.

savedLists.title: Saved lists
savedLists.description: Your SLP-vetted lists and the ones you built in Pro.

usage.title: Activity
usage.description: How many times your links were opened this week.
